name: G-12 validate-all: text is the default format when --format is not specified
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; grep -qv '"files_total"' err.txt && echo text_default 1>&2
